selected: to take the long, long view

system.moves:
- Remain unmoved
- See through any tree in the forest
- Animate her own tree (almost impossible to harm with weapons, or even fire)
- Call upon the power of Danu herself
- Lay a lasting curse on a defiler

Old grandmothers of the Wood, the hen- nain are few and ancient and mighty. They watch, and they wait, and they endure. It takes a dire threat indeed to rouse one, and even then it acts in slow and inscrutable ways. For a hennain cares not one bit for any given creature or tree; she cares only for the slow turn of the forest itself.
